comment_content:
Chelsea played for 60 minutes like the best team in the world, and then for 30 minutes like a second-division side. Same story every time.
Badiashile simply isn’t good enough, and our wingers lack quality when you compare them to Hazard and Willian / Pedro back in the day. Garnacho in particular is just not acceptable at this level.
That said, Chelsea were outstanding for 60 minutes against such a strong team — not many teams can do that.
It really doesn’t feel like much is missing. Maybe it’s experience, maybe fitness — I honestly don’t know. For every Chelsea fan, it’s a complete mystery.

comment_content:
Guys here's what I think about this loss:
1. Villa's just too damn lucky; strikes from Cole, Reece and others were perfect, but were rejected by the woodwork or random Villa players standing there.
On the Villa side, Watkins's first goal was pure luck, lucky rebound coming from Sanchez, who was perfect all game long.
2. Our team is perfectly fine; this team has just got soooo much potential, but they should keep on working some things that were missed during the game (Enzo's shot at the start should end up becoming a goal). Otherwise everyone actually played well. A positive note comes from Cole who could have easily had two goals if it wasn't for Villa's luck. 
Each player on this team is class, they just have to adjust some small things.
3. Refs; that Maatsen intevention on the cross to Neto should have been ruled a pen, but apart from this and other small imperfections we should never put the blame on refs.
4. Energy has got to change; we haven't done well in the last couple of games, but Chelsea was pretty good in all of them: what I think could be the problem is energy: this team is talented, plays togheater and is clearly having fun on th pitch but once things get bad (even just when the other team ties the game), it all starts going downhill. If this YOUNG (we have to keep in mind that this is the youngest team in the Prem) team learns how to react to these upsets, its going to be dangerous; unfortunatly this takes time... P.S. notice how most of the games we win are the games where Chelsea stars off with 2, 3 goals and the other team never makes it difficult for them by never equalizing the game. 
5. One last thing we, as fans, could do is not to criticize players. Chelsea isn't like this, I'd expect this from other clubss but not Chelsea. We should always appreciate the work these boys put in day in and day out. We can suggest things but lets not ''attack'' a player just because he isn't doing well, if we keep on doing this he wont reach a better form.
Thanks for your time.

comment_content:
첼시는 왼쪽 윙어에 1억 파운드를 썼는데, 그 돈 중 절반만 센터백 사는데 썼어도 이번 시즌에 승점을 꽤나 지켰을거다. 기튼스를 산 것은 도르트문트에 60000000파운드를 기부한 거지. 우크라이나에 무드릭을 영입하면서 70000000유로를 기부한 것으로 부족했나?
로메오 라비아는 3년 동안 한 경기를 100% 소화한 적이 없지. 
애당초 투헬(현재 잉글랜드 감독)이라는 감독을 어이없게 해고한 마두로같은 구단주들과 보드진들이 문제다. 
내가 10년도 더 봐온 첼시는 항상 우승에 도전하는 팀이었는데, 지금은 아스널이나 토트넘처럼 챔피언스리그에 출전하는 것만으로도 만족하는 패배자가 됐어. 
빌어먹을 미국 야구 시스템 좀 폐기처분해라, 브라이튼에 패배하고, 몰락한 맨체스터에 패배하고, 빌라같은 팀한테 원정도 아닌 홈에서 지는게 말이되냐? 
지금 마레스카를 해고하면 지능이 금붕어만도 못한 구단주들과 보드진이 클롭이라도 데려올 수 있냐? 토트넘이 토마스 프랭크를 데려오듯 이번에도 얼마 못갈 능력 없는 감독이나 영입하겠지. 또 돈있으면 뭐하냐, 10억 파운드로 유망주나 사겠지. 
첼시가 무슨 유치원이야? 
지금 첼시는 런던에 있는 파란색의 맨체스터 유나이티드 같다. 
축구는 미국 야구하고 다르게 현재가 없으면 미래도 없어.
